milestones: Output contains an [Iteration Summary] section that describes at least one exchange between buyer and seller regarding the Jewelry Organizer Stand
Output contains an [Agent Actions and Tools Used] section listing each agent's action with Tool Parameters shown as structured data including a price or counter_price value
Output contains a [Key Strategies and Observations] section analyzing both buyer and seller strategies
At least two distinct agent roles (buyer and seller) each take at least one tool-based action during the negotiation
All proposed prices fall within or near the plausible negotiation range bounded by the buyer opening offer of 19.99 USD and the original listing price of 29.99 USD
At least two different negotiation tool types are used across the simulation (e.g., offer price, reject and counter, provide information, or end negotiation)
